content: Local-first sync options split into three families: read-path/database sync such as Electric, optimistic client/server mutation sync such as Replicache, document CRDTs such as Yjs/Automerge, and all-in local databases such as RxDB/TinyBase/PouchDB. For Flowgrid v1, keep Dexie records plus an operation queue; defer adopting a sync framework until actual multi-device semantics are specified.
